messages.content: You are an industrial catalog auditor. Classify each row into one of these categories only: gas_safety, fire_safety, hvac_components, industrial_sensors, valves_actuators, it_hardware, packaging_materials, construction_supplies, toxic_fake, unknown. Return strict JSON only.

{"task": "Reclassify each row with same taxonomy only.", "rules": {"valid_categories": ["construction_supplies", "fire_safety", "gas_safety", "hvac_components", "industrial_sensors", "it_hardware", "packaging_materials", "toxic_fake", "unknown", "valves_actuators"], "output_format": "JSON array only", "required_fields": ["slice_rank", "sku_code", "llm_category", "llm_brand", "confidence", "reason"], "confidence_range": "0..1", "keep_reason_short": true}, "rows": [{"slice_rank": 1, "sku_code": "CCPCF901", "qty": 600.0, "effective_usd": 1716185.525641, "category_engine": "fire_safety", "brand_engine": "unknown", "raw_text": "Control Firewall Module, 8Port+1uplink, модель/артикул CC-PCF901, кол-во 1", "full_row_text": "Control Firewall Module, 8Port+1uplink, модель/артикул CC-PCF901, кол-во 1 | nan | nan | nan | nan | nan | nan | nan | nan | nan | nan | nan"}, {"slice_rank": 2, "sku_code": "CPOPC400", "qty": 400.0, "effective_usd": 1439589.74359, "category_engine": "hvac_components", "brand_engine": "unknown", "raw_text": "Контроллер свободно программируемый CPO-PC400 plant ctrl, модель/артикул CPO-PC400, кол-во 31", "full_row_text": "Контроллер свободно программируемый CPO-PC400 plant ctrl, модель/артикул CPO-PC400, кол-во 31 | nan | nan | nan | nan | nan | nan | nan | nan | nan | nan | nan"}]}
